arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui, who is yet to see West Ham win at home in the league since taking over, hooked Mohammed Kudus at half time against Brentford and left the Ghana star reportedly fuming

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town: Kalvin Phillips feeling loved after West Ham negativity
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: Kalvin Phillips has started Ipswich Town's Premier League draws against Fulham, Brighton and Aston Villa. The former Leeds and England star has endured a difficult couple of years, struggling for game time at Man City, being labelled 'overweight' by Pep Guardiola, dropping out the international set-up and then receiving criticism during a brief loan spell at West Ham.
